requirement_topic.en: BESS Fire Safety Installation — Ecuador Cuerpo de Bomberos Permit and Applicable Fire Code Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: BESS消防安全安装——厄瓜多尔消防局许可及适用消防规范要求
requirement_topic.zht: BESS消防安全安裝——厄瓜多消防局許可及適用消防規範要求

summary.en: In Ecuador, fire safety installation approval for commercial and industrial facilities is administered at the municipal level by the Cuerpo de Bomberos (fire authority) of the relevant canton or municipality. The Cuerpo de Bomberos issues operating permits (permisos de funcionamiento) for commercial and industrial facilities, which require fire-safety system compliance as a precondition. A Cuerpo de Bomberos permit is a standard prerequisite for commissioning any commercial or industrial BESS installation in Ecuador. Ecuador does not have a single nationally confirmed BESS-specific fire installation code equivalent to NFPA 855; local fire authorities and project owners typically reference international standards including NFPA 855 (Standard for the Installation of Stationary Energy Storage Systems) and IEC 62933-5-1/5-2 for BESS fire-safety design. The applicable fire code and any Ecuador-specific derogations must be verified directly with the local Cuerpo de Bomberos having jurisdiction over the project site. Additionally, ARCERNNR authorization for grid-connected BESS projects may require fire-safety documentation as part of the project technical dossier.
summary.zh: 在厄瓜多尔，商业及工业设施的消防安全安装审批由相关县市的消防局（Cuerpo de Bomberos）在市级层面管理。消防局为商业及工业设施颁发运营许可（permisos de funcionamiento），消防安全系统合规是前提条件。消防局许可是厄瓜多尔任何商业或工业BESS装置投入使用的标准前置要求。厄瓜多尔目前没有单一的全国性经确认的BESS专项消防安装规范，等同于NFPA 855；当地消防主管机关和项目业主通常参考包括NFPA 855（固定式储能系统安装标准）和IEC 62933-5-1/5-2在内的国际标准进行BESS消防安全设计。适用消防规范及任何厄瓜多尔专项豁免，须直接向对项目所在地有管辖权的当地消防局核实。此外，ARCERNNR对并网BESS项目的授权可能要求在项目技术档案中提供消防安全文件。
summary.zht: 在厄瓜多，商業及工業設施的消防安全安裝審批由相關縣市的消防局（Cuerpo de Bomberos）在市級層面管理。消防局為商業及工業設施頒發運營許可（permisos de funcionamiento），消防安全系統合規是前提條件。消防局許可是厄瓜多任何商業或工業BESS裝置投入使用的標準前置要求。厄瓜多目前沒有單一的全國性經確認的BESS專項消防安裝規範，等同於NFPA 855；當地消防主管機關和項目業主通常參考包括NFPA 855（固定式儲能系統安裝標準）和IEC 62933-5-1/5-2在內的國際標準進行BESS消防安全設計。適用消防規範及任何厄瓜多專項豁免，須直接向對項目所在地有管轄權的當地消防局核實。此外，ARCERNNR對併網BESS項目的授權可能要求在項目技術檔案中提供消防安全文件。

standards_or_laws: Cuerpo de Bomberos (local canton/municipal fire authority) — permiso de funcionamiento (operating permit) required for commercial and industrial BESS installations in Ecuador

NFPA 855 — Standard for the Installation of Stationary Energy Storage Systems (internationally referenced BESS fire-installation code; local Cuerpo de Bomberos adoption and any Ecuador-specific requirements must be verified directly with the authority having jurisdiction)

IEC 62933-5-1:2024 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety considerations — Hazard identification, risk assessment and risk mitigation (system-level safety standard expected in project specifications)
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems
ARCERNNR — storage project authorization may require fire-safety documentation as part of technical dossier

summary.en: China manages BESS fire safety under a combination of mandatory standards and project-level fire-safety review. GB 44240-2024 (effective August 1, 2025) includes fire-safety provisions for BESS cells and modules. GB/T 36276-2023 and GB/T 36558-2023 cover system-level safety including fire-related requirements. Project-level fire-safety review in China is conducted by local fire authorities (消防主管部门) under the Ministry of Emergency Management framework. These Chinese fire-safety standards and domestic approval procedures are not recognised by Ecuador's Cuerpo de Bomberos as equivalent to international BESS fire-installation standards. BESS fire-safety evidence prepared under Chinese GB standards must be supplemented with NFPA 855-aligned design documentation and IEC 62933-5-2 evidence for project review by Ecuador fire authorities and ARCERNNR.
summary.zh: 中国通过强制性标准和项目级消防审查相结合的方式管理BESS消防安全。GB 44240-2024（2025年8月1日起生效）包含BESS电芯和模组的消防安全规定。GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558-2023涵盖包括消防相关要求在内的系统级安全。中国的项目级消防审查由应急管理部框架下的地方消防主管部门负责。上述中国消防安全标准和国内审批程序不被厄瓜多尔消防局认可为与国际BESS消防安装标准等效。依据中国GB标准准备的BESS消防安全证据，须在厄瓜多尔消防主管机关和ARCERNNR项目审查中，补充符合NFPA 855要求的设计文件和IEC 62933-5-2证据。
summary.zht: 中國通過強制性標準和項目級消防審查相結合的方式管理BESS消防安全。GB 44240-2024（2025年8月1日起生效）包含BESS電芯和模組的消防安全規定。GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558-2023涵蓋包括消防相關要求在內的系統級安全。中國的項目級消防審查由應急管理部框架下的地方消防主管部門負責。上述中國消防安全標準和國內審批程序不被厄瓜多消防局認可為與國際BESS消防安裝標準等效。依據中國GB標準準備的BESS消防安全證據，須在厄瓜多消防主管機關和ARCERNNR項目審查中，補充符合NFPA 855要求的設計文件和IEC 62933-5-2證據。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (includes fire-safety provisions for BESS cells/modules; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems)

gap.en: Gap: A Cuerpo de Bomberos operating permit is a mandatory prerequisite for commissioning commercial and industrial BESS installations in Ecuador. Chinese BESS fire-safety documentation based on GB standards does not satisfy Ecuador fire authority requirements. Exporters and project teams should: (a) identify the Cuerpo de Bomberos having jurisdiction over the project site (municipal or canton level) and confirm whether NFPA 855 has been adopted as the applicable standard for BESS installations and any local-specific requirements or derogations; (b) prepare BESS fire-safety design documentation aligned with NFPA 855 — including thermal-runaway propagation mitigation, gas detection or ventilation design, suppression system design, emergency shutdown procedures, and separation distances appropriate for Ecuador's 60 Hz electrical environment; (c) confirm whether ARCERNNR's storage project authorization process requires fire-safety documentation as part of the technical dossier and prepare accordingly; (d) engage a locally licensed fire protection engineer or fire-safety consultant familiar with Ecuador's municipal fire permitting process for design review and permit application before commissioning.
gap.zh: 差距：消防局运营许可是厄瓜多尔商业及工业BESS装置投入使用的强制前置要求。依据GB标准编制的中国BESS消防安全文件不满足厄瓜多尔消防主管机关要求。出口商和项目团队应：（a）确定对项目所在地（市级或县级）有管辖权的消防局，确认NFPA 855是否已作为BESS安装适用标准采用，以及任何地方专项要求或豁免；（b）准备符合NFPA 855要求的BESS消防安全设计文件——包括热失控蔓延缓解、气体探测或通风设计、抑制系统设计、紧急停机程序及适合厄瓜多尔60 Hz电气环境的隔离距离；（c）确认ARCERNNR储能项目授权流程是否要求在技术档案中提供消防安全文件，并做好相应准备；（d）在投入使用前，聘请熟悉厄瓜多尔市级消防许可流程的本地持牌消防工程师或消防安全顾问进行设计审查和许可申请。
gap.zht: 差距：消防局運營許可是厄瓜多商業及工業BESS裝置投入使用的強制前置要求。依據GB標準編制的中國BESS消防安全文件不滿足厄瓜多消防主管機關要求。出口商和項目團隊應：（a）確定對項目所在地（市級或縣級）有管轄權的消防局，確認NFPA 855是否已作為BESS安裝適用標準採用，以及任何地方專項要求或豁免；（b）準備符合NFPA 855要求的BESS消防安全設計文件——包括熱失控蔓延緩解、氣體探測或通風設計、抑制系統設計、緊急停機程序及適合厄瓜多60 Hz電氣環境的隔離距離；（c）確認ARCERNNR儲能項目授權流程是否要求在技術檔案中提供消防安全文件，並做好相應準備；（d）在投入使用前，聘請熟悉厄瓜多市級消防許可流程的本地持牌消防工程師或消防安全顧問進行設計審查和許可申請。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — Cuerpo de Bomberos operating permit (permiso de funcionamiento) required for all commercial and industrial BESS installations in Ecuador before commissioning; applicable fire code (NFPA 855 adoption status for BESS) must be verified with the local authority having jurisdiction
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific depending on Chinese project approval, installation type, and local fire authority requirements; Chinese approvals not recognised in Ecuador

source.publisher: ARCERNNR — Agencia de Regulación y Control de Energía y Recursos Naturales No Renovables (Ecuador)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A Cuerpo de Bomberos operating permit is a mandatory installation gate for commercial and industrial BESS in Ecuador. Chinese GB-standard fire-safety documentation does not satisfy Ecuador fire authority requirements. Engage the local Cuerpo de Bomberos having jurisdiction and a licensed fire protection engineer at the earliest project stage to confirm the applicable fire code (including whether NFPA 855 is adopted for stationary BESS installations), any local derogations, and design requirements before committing to system layout or equipment specification. Also confirm ARCERNNR fire-safety documentation requirements as part of the storage project authorization process.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 消防局运营许可是厄瓜多尔商业及工业BESS装置的强制安装门槛。中国GB标准消防安全文件不满足厄瓜多尔消防主管机关要求。在确定系统布局或设备规格前，应在项目最早阶段与对项目所在地有管辖权的当地消防局及持牌消防工程师接触，确认适用消防规范（包括NFPA 855是否已针对固定式BESS装置采用）、任何地方豁免及设计要求。同时确认ARCERNNR储能项目授权流程中对消防安全文件的要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 消防局運營許可是厄瓜多商業及工業BESS裝置的強制安裝門檻。中國GB標準消防安全文件不滿足厄瓜多消防主管機關要求。在確定系統布局或設備規格前，應在項目最早階段與對項目所在地有管轄權的當地消防局及持牌消防工程師接觸，確認適用消防規範（包括NFPA 855是否已針對固定式BESS裝置採用）、任何地方豁免及設計要求。同時確認ARCERNNR儲能項目授權流程中對消防安全文件的要求。
